hero.subtitle:
We undertake all kinds of precision parts processing, from prototype to mass production, with accuracy up to ±0.005mm.
Custom processing based on drawings and samples, supporting aluminum, stainless steel, copper, titanium alloys and more.

capabilities.title: Core Machining Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Advanced equipment and exquisite craftsmanship to meet your high-precision processing needs

items.title: Machining Accuracy
items.desc: Maximum machining accuracy up to ±0.005mm, surface roughness Ra0.8, meeting precision parts processing requirements

items.title: Machining Range
items.desc: Maximum machining size 1200×800×600mm, capable of processing rotating parts with diameters from 5mm to 500mm

items.title: Production Efficiency
items.desc: 24-hour continuous production capacity, prototype cycle 3-5 days, mass order on-time delivery rate over 98%

items.title: Equipment Quantity
items.desc: 20 CNC machining centers, 10 CNC lathes, 5 micro injection molding machines, annual capacity exceeding one million pieces

items.title: Quality Inspection
items.desc: Equipped with CMM, projectors, roughness testers and other inspection equipment, full-process quality control

items.title: Logistics Delivery
items.desc: Support nationwide logistics delivery, freight forwarding available, urgent orders support SF Express to ensure on-time delivery
